title: [FIRRTL] Update the memory module name
body:
Use the `name` attribute on `firrtl.mem` to create a name for the memory module.
The problem here is that, the memory name is being generated during metadata emission.
But the `firrtl.mem` is being lowered to the extern module after metadata emission, during `LowerToHW`.

Update the `CreateSifiveMetadata` pass, to iterate over all memory nodes, and create unique memory module names.
Set the `modName` attribute on the memory op, which will be used during lowering.
If the metadata emission pass does not update the `modName` then, use the memory properties to generate a memory name.
